glosses.vi: đóng đinh; cố định bằng đinh
glosses.hi: कील ठोकना; कीलों से स्थिर करना
glosses.ro: a bate în cuie; a fixa cu cuie

sentences.target: Je cloue cette planche au mur.

translations.fr: Je cloue cette planche au mur.
translations.en: I'm nailing this plank to the wall.
translations.es: Estoy clavando esta tabla a la pared.
translations.de: Ich nagle dieses Brett an die Wand.
translations.it: Sto inchiodando questa tavola al muro.
translations.ko: 이 판자를 벽에 못으로 박고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正在把这块木板钉在墙上。
translations.yue: 我喺度將呢塊木板釘喺牆上。
translations.ru: Я прибиваю эту доску к стене.
translations.pt: Estou pregando esta tábua na parede.
translations.he: אני ממסמר את הקרש הזה לקיר.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đóng tấm ván này vào tường.
translations.ar: أنا أدق هذا اللوح في الجدار.
translations.nl: Ik spijker deze plank aan de muur.
translations.uk: Я прибиваю цю дошку до стіни.
translations.hu: Ezt a deszkát a falhoz szegelem.
translations.hi: मैं इस तख्ते को दीवार पर ठोक रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Καρφώνω αυτή τη σανίδα στον τοίχο.
translations.nb: Jeg spikrer denne planken fast i veggen.
translations.id: Saya sedang memaku papan ini ke dinding.
translations.sv: Jag spikar fast den här plankan i väggen.
translations.da: Jeg sømmer denne planke fast på væggen.
translations.ja: この板を壁に釘で打ち付けています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; syntactic subject of the verb.
Main lexical verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; action of nailing.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; modifies 'planche'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'cloue'.
Preposition in the fused form 'à + le'; introduces the locative PP 'au mur'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'à' (in 'au mur').

sentences.target: Nous clouons une pancarte pour la fête.
sentences.reading: /nu kluɔ̃ yn pɑ̃kaʁt puʁ la fɛt/

translations.fr: Nous clouons une pancarte pour la fête.
translations.ipa: /nu kluɔ̃ yn pɑ̃kaʁt puʁ la fɛt/
translations.en: We're nailing a sign for the party.
translations.es: Estamos clavando un cartel para la fiesta.
translations.de: Wir nageln ein Schild für die Party.
translations.it: Stiamo inchiodando un cartello per la festa.
translations.ko: 우리는 파티용 표지판을 못으로 박고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在为聚会钉一个牌子。
translations.pt: Estamos pregando uma placa para a festa.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang đóng một tấm biển cho bữa tiệc.
translations.nl: We spijkeren een bord voor het feest vast.
translations.hu: Egy táblát szegezünk fel a bulira.
translations.hi: हम पार्टी के लिए एक तख्ती ठोक रहे हैं.
translations.el: Καρφώνουμε μια πινακίδα για το πάρτι.
translations.nb: Vi spikrer opp et skilt til festen.
translations.id: Kami sedang memaku sebuah papan untuk pesta.
translations.sv: Vi spikar upp en skylt till festen.
translations.ro: Batem în cuie o pancartă pentru petrecere.
translations.da: Vi sømmer et skilt op til festen.
translations.ja: 私たちはパーティー用の看板を打ち付けています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person plural; syntactic subject of the verb.
Main lexical verb, present indicative, 1st person plural.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'pancarte'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'clouons'.
Preposition; introduces a purpose/occasion PP ('pour la fête').
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'fête'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: Tu dois clouer le cadre au mur.
sentences.reading: /ty dwa klwe lə kadʁ o myʁ/

translations.fr: Tu dois clouer le cadre au mur.
translations.ipa: /ty dwa klwe lə kadʁ o myʁ/
translations.en: You have to nail the frame to the wall.
translations.es: Tienes que clavar el marco en la pared.
translations.de: Du musst den Rahmen an die Wand nageln.
translations.it: Devi inchiodare la cornice al muro.
translations.yue: 你要將個相框釘喺牆上。
translations.ru: Тебе нужно прибить рамку к стене.
translations.pt: Você tem que pregar a moldura na parede.
translations.he: אתה צריך למסמר את המסגרת לקיר.
translations.vi: Bạn phải đóng đinh cái khung vào tường.
translations.ar: عليك أن تدق الإطار في الحائط.
translations.nl: Je moet de lijst aan de muur spijkeren.
translations.uk: Ти маєш прибити рамку до стіни.
translations.hu: A keretet a falhoz kell szegelned.
translations.hi: तुम्हें फ्रेम को दीवार पर ठोकना होगा.
translations.el: Πρέπει να καρφώσεις την κορνίζα στον τοίχο.
translations.nb: Du må spikre rammen fast i veggen.
translations.id: Kamu harus memakukan bingkai ke dinding.
translations.sv: Du måste spika fast ramen i väggen.
translations.ro: Trebuie să bați rama în perete.
translations.da: Du skal sømme rammen fast på væggen.
translations.ja: 額を壁に釘で打ち付けなければなりません。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; syntactic subject of 'dois'.
Modal verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; expresses obligation and governs the infinitive 'clouer'.
Infinitive lexical verb; complement of 'dois'.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'cadre'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'clouer'.
Preposition in the fused form 'à + le'; introduces the locative PP 'au mur'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'à' (in 'au mur').

sentences.target: Vous clouez les planches sous la pluie.
sentences.reading: /vu klwe le plɑ̃ʃ su la plɥi/

translations.fr: Vous clouez les planches sous la pluie.
translations.ipa: /vu klwe le plɑ̃ʃ su la plɥi/
translations.en: You're nailing the boards in the rain.
translations.es: Están clavando las tablas bajo la lluvia.
translations.de: Ihr nagelt die Bretter im Regen.
translations.it: State inchiodando le assi sotto la pioggia.
translations.ko: 여러분은 빗속에서 판자를 못으로 박고 있어요.
translations.pt: Vocês estão pregando as tábuas na chuva.
translations.vi: Các bạn đang đóng ván dưới mưa.
translations.nl: Jullie spijkeren de planken i n de regen vast.
translations.hi: आप लोग बारिश में तख्ते ठोक रहे हैं.
translations.id: Kalian sedang memaku papan di bawah hujan.
translations.sv: Ni spikar fast brädorna i regnet.
translations.ro: Bateți în cuie scândurile pe ploaie.
translations.ja: あなたたちは雨の中で板を釘で打ち付けています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person plural (or formal singular); syntactic subject of the verb.
Main lexical verb, present indicative, 2nd person plural.
Definite article, plural; determiner of 'planches'.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of 'clouez'.
Preposition; introduces a circumstantial/locative PP ('sous la pluie').
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'pluie'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'sous'.
